name: Apparatus Page Overlay Wipe
description: Full-viewport overlay panel slides in to cover the current view, swaps underlying content at peak coverage, then slides out to reveal the next view. Prevents visual co-existence with a physical solid barrier.

parameters.name: coverDuration
parameters.description: Duration in ms for overlay cover phase

parameters.name: revealDuration
parameters.description: Duration in ms for overlay reveal phase

parameters.name: wipeDirection
parameters.description: Direction of overlay motion (bottom-to-top, top-to-bottom, left-to-right, right-to-left)

parameters.name: overlayColor
parameters.description: Solid color for physical barrier overlay panel

parameters.name: showAccentHairline
parameters.description: Whether to render a high-precision hairline on leading edge
